title: HP Laptop
short description: RF Interference Signals From HP Laptop
description:
**HP EliteBook 8560W RF Interference**

This signal is emitted from the HP EliteBook 8560W.
It is present at all times when the laptop is powered on.
Touching the touch pad increases the signal strength dramatically.

The signal is centered at 50.9 Khz. It swaps between 2 frequencies +- ~153 Hz from the center frequency. Each tone lasts approximately 125 ms.

It is unknown why this signal is generated, or why it acts like an idling FSK signal. It is speculated that this is unintended interference from the laptop.

The IQ file was recorded by using the built-in soundcard as a crude VLF receiver, with a random wire antenna.
Nearby VLF receivers will also hear the same thing.
